    Conference and Workshop Papers

    1. Dongyun Xue, Haomiao Yang, Mengyu Ge, Jingwei Li, Guowen Xu, and Hongwei Li, Fast Generation-Based Gradient Leakage Attacks against Highly Compressed Gradients, in Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM), 2023.

  author = {Xue, Dongyun and Yang, Haomiao and Ge, Mengyu and Li, Jingwei and Xu, Guowen and Li, Hongwei},
  title = {Fast Generation-Based Gradient Leakage Attacks against Highly Compressed Gradients},

    2. Jingwei Li, Yanjing Ren, Patrick P. C. Lee, Yuyu Wang, Ting Chen, and Xiaosong Zhang, FeatureSpy: Detecting Learning-Content Attacks via Feature Inspection in Secure Deduplicated Storage, in Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM), 2023.

  year = {2023}
}
